ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing automated data pipeline testing, including unit tests for transformations, integration tests for end-to-end data flows, and regression testing for schema and data quality changes.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in performing root cause analysis.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of root cause analysis tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-S-009 (DA, Skill) maps to BI Developer scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4392 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: eu_ai_act=0.439, nist_ai_rmf=0.432, ddat=0.414. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within business intelligence development and analytics engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4392 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DA-S-009 (DA, composite 0.4392) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DCWF 421 and DDAT Data Architect profiles; DA competencies at awareness level appear in senior IC data analyst role profiles does not surface this DA-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4392 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DA domain content at composite 0.4392 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4392, domain DA. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
